sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99812" key="sundwre/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνδωρέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n99812.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">present at the same time</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:8:16:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.16.6</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συνεχαρίσατο</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
